name: TARGETPAIR_COUNT_BEFORE_YEAR
description: Count patents for a target pair before a given year.
cypher: MATCH (tp:TargetPair {name:$tp_name})<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year) WHERE y.year < $year RETURN tp.name AS target_pair, $year AS cutoff_year, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count LIMIT 1;
